detail.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
detail.reindexStartedSub: Indexing runs in background. Check the documents list for progress.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.emptyText: Ask a question about your indexed documents.
assistant.cannotAnswer: I cannot answer this based on the provided documents.

legal.title: Legal
legal.eulaText:
This End User License Agreement ("Agreement") is a legal agreement between you and Searchio. By installing or using the application, you agree to be bound by these terms.

1. License Grant: We grant you a personal, non-transferable license to use the app for personal, non-commercial purposes.

2. Restrictions: You may not decompile, reverse engineer, or attempt to derive the source code of the app.

3. Data Privacy: We do not collect your personal documents. All indexing and searching happen locally on your device or via your configured endpoints.

4. Termination: This license is effective until terminated by you or us. Your rights under this license will terminate automatically if you fail to comply with any of its terms.
legal.privacyText:
Your privacy is our priority. 

1. Data Collection: We do not store your documents on our servers. All data remains on your device.

2. AI Processing: If you use the AI Assistant, your queries and relevant document chunks may be sent to the configured AI provider. Please check their privacy policy for details.

3. Analytics: We may collect anonymous usage data to improve the app.
